title: NormalizedAdapterEvent
description: Single normalized event emitted by a kruon deep adapter (Codex / Claude Code). This is the contract both adapters stream into; 2D, 3D, audit and diagnostics only consume this shape. approval_mode MUST be honestly exposed per adapter and never upgraded to per_action without run-loop proof.

schema_version.description: Normalized event schema version. Bumped on breaking change.

adapter.description: Source CLI that produced the raw event.

session_id.description: Upstream session id if known; null before session.created / init observed.

event_id.description: Stable, unique id for this normalized event (adapter-scoped).

ts.description: Event timestamp (ISO8601 string or epoch seconds); null if absent in raw.

event_type.description: Normalized event type, e.g. session.start, assistant.message, tool.call, approval.request, artifact.file, task.complete, error, unknown.

phase.description: Coarse run phase this event belongs to. 'degraded' = parser produced a best-effort event but confidence is low; 'uncertain' = terminal state could not be determined and must not be disguised as completed.

approval_mode.description: Approval capability of the adapter run that produced this event. per_action = each high-risk action yields a bound approval request (Claude Code manual + stream-json, target). sandbox_policy_only = no per-action channel; risk is bounded by a frozen pre-launch sandbox/policy (Codex exec). none = no approval gating at all (never the default for high-risk work). Must match the run's capability manifest; never inferred from help text alone for per_action.

approval_request.description: Present only for event_type=approval.request. Carries the parameter fingerprint the user decision is bound to.

kind.description: Action class, e.g. shell_command, file_write, network.

fingerprint.description: Stable hash of the bound parameters (command/args/paths). Parameter drift MUST invalidate this.

params.description: Redacted snapshot of the bound parameters.

content.description: Free-form textual/structured payload (assistant message, tool output, etc.). Already redacted.

in_workspace.description: False if path escapes the trusted workspace (policy violation candidate).

terminal_state.description: Required when phase=terminal. 'unknown' is a first-class terminal state for unreconciled runs; it must never be coerced to completed.

degraded.description: True when the parser emitted a best-effort event with low confidence (malformed/unknown raw event).

source.description: Provenance of the normalized event for replay/debugging.

raw_type.description: Original upstream type field (e.g. codex 'turn.completed', claude 'assistant'). 'unknown' when raw event could not be classified.
